LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED, PLAINTIFF IS UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. TENDER IS REQUIRED. SEE U.S. COLD STORAGE V. GREAT WESTERN SAVINGS & LOAN ASSOCIATION, (1985) 165 CAL.APP.3D 1214. A TECHNICAL DEFECT IN THE SALE PROCEDURE WILL NOT INVALIDATE THE SALE UNLESS THE BORROWER SUFFERED PREJUDICE WHICH IS NOT SHOWN HERE. SEE KNAPP V. DOHERTY (2004) 123 CAL.APP.4TH 76. CC SECTION 2924 ET. SEQ. IS A COMPREHENSIVE SCHEME REGARDING FORECLOSURE. CC SECTION 2924(A)(1) PROVIDING THAT THE TRUSTEE, MORTGAGEE OR BENEFICIARY OR ANY OF THEIR AUTHORIZED AGENTS CAN SEEK FORECLOSURE DOES NOT REQUIRE THAT THE NOTE BE PRODUCED. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
NOTICE OF RULING FILED BY DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES, LLC

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Off Calendar

Osc Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. Appearances: Charles R. Bell of McCarthy & Holthus LLP (619.955.1578) for defendant and responding party; Mark P. Meuser (577.2850) for plaintiff and moving party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied, plaintiff is unlikely to prevail on the merits. Tender is required. See U.S. Cold Storage v. Great Western Savings & Loan Association, (1985) 165 Cal.App.3d 1214. A technical defect in the sale procedure will not invalidate the sale unless the borrower suffered prejudice which is not shown here. See Knapp v. Doherty (2004) 123 Cal.App.4th 76. CC section 2924 et. seq. is a comprehensive scheme regarding foreclosure. CC section 2924(a)(1) providing that the trustee, mortgagee or beneficiary or any of their authorized agents can seek foreclosure does not require that the note be produced. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
